description: Org-wide inherited Renovate config for Iser Labs. Applies to every repo in the org when the Renovate app has `inheritConfig` enabled (Mend cloud: org setting; self-hosted: RENOVATE_INHERIT_CONFIG=true). Until then this file is dormant. The primary job is keeping each site's `@iserlabs/web-kit` git-tag pin current (observability standard R6/R7).

packageRules.description: Never auto-adopt a major bump of any dep — open the PR, let a human review (R7: a bad release must not propagate fleet-wide).
